title: Segfault: `Py_DECREF(NULL)` in `PyContextVar_Set` (`context.c:367`)
description: `Python/context.c`: unchecked `token_new()` NULL -> `Py_DECREF(tok)` on the `contextvar_set()` failure path under OOM
notes: Build-agnostic (NOT free-threading-specific). The _py_warnings vehicle only reaches it when context_aware_warnings is on (FT default); the C bug reproduces via direct contextvars.ContextVar.set() on GIL builds too.
